tags.name: Fever & pain relief
tags.tagLine: Care for your Health and Wellbeing

metaData.Key Information:
• Used to relieve pain and swelling
• Designed to deliver Ketoprofenn through the skin to the target area, providing relief for arthritis, tennis elbow, muscle ache, sports and exercise related injuries such as sprains, strains and bruises
metaData.Preparation:
• To use:
1. Remove film-coated thin paper backing from lint fabric
2. Apply lint fabric to the affected part twice daily
• Caution:
1. Do not use for more than 2 weeks unless directed
2. Do not use if allergic to ketoprofen, non-steroidal anti-inflammatory painkillers (NSAIDS) or aspirin
3. Avoid contact with eyes, mucous membranes, wounds and broken skin
4. Not to be used with other dressings
5. Not to be used on infected skin
6. Some users may experience skin reactions such as redness, dryness and irritation
7. Hypersensitivity reactions (breathing difficulties, skin hives) happens very rarely but if it occurs, discontinue use and consult your doctor
8. Asthmatic patients, children, expectant and breastfeeding mothers are advised to consult a doctor or pharmacist before use
metaData.Storage Information: Store at or below 30°C, away from direct sunlight

tags.name: Fever & pain relief

metaData.Key Information: An analgesic gel for relief of minor aches and pains of muscles associated with strains, sprains, bruises and sports injuries.
metaData.Preparation:
• Directions:
To be applied 3 - 4 times per day
• Precaution:
1. For external use only
2. Do not apply to soft tissues and eyes
3. Children below 2 years old should consult a doctor before use
4. Not to be use with hot pack and other counter irritant products
metaData.Storage Information:
• Store below 30°C
• Keep out of reach of children

product.description: Tiger Balm Plaster provides long lasting relief and is comfortable to wear. With a trusted herbal formulation, Tiger Balm Plaster Warm helps to relieve muscular fatigue, muscular pain, stiff shoulders, contusion, sprain and backache. Using advance hydrogel technology together with non-woven ventilated material, Tiger Balm Plaster is easy to wear, leaves no residue on skin, making it ideal for everyday use.

metaData.Ingredients: Active Ingredients Per 100G Of Paste: Camphor 1.0G, Mentha Oil 0.6G, Eucalyptus Oil 0.5G, Menthol 0.3G, Capsicum Extract 0.2G
metaData.Key Information: Tiger Balm Plaster Warm provides long-lasting soothing relief for muscular fatigue, muscular pain, stiff shoulders, contusion, sprain and backache.
metaData.Preparation: Clean and dry area of application. Peel off the protective film and apply the plaster to the affected area once or twice a day. Do not apply plaster one hour before and after bathing.
metaData.Storage Information: Keep unused plasters in the original condition packaging. Do not expose unused plasters to atmosphere for too long.

product.name: Tiger Balm Plaster - Warm (Large)

metaData.Key Information:
• Protects healthy joints and repairs worn-out joints
• High strength with only 10% of glucosamine
metaData.Preparation:
Massage cream onto affected area for a minute
Important:
• For healthy joints, apply once daily
• For worn-out joints, apply twice daily for a minimal period of 1 month
